verse_text: Obey those who rule over you, and be submissive, for they watch out for your souls, as those who must give account. Let them do so with joy and not with grief, for that would be unprofitable for you.

links.context: Humility is the foundation of virtue; it is learned through submission and obedience to godly elders. In submitting to one another, we humble ourselves under the mighty hand of God (see [[1TH.5:12]], [[1TH.5:13]]; [[HEB.13:7]], [[HEB.13:17]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: Here the vision concerns the heavenly altar (v. 46), imaged in the Divine Liturgy, where the saints offer their whole being to God in praise and worship. See [[HEB.13:10]]-19 and notes. The court is the foursquare fullness of the Church, which operates in faith, hope, charity, and good works.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
